narrative: Update PA agent (Max) to support capturing personal email via Notion pages — design a capture path for Jeremy's personal Gmail, since the Gmail MCP connector is scoped to the business account (jeremy@sidecarcapitalpartners.com). Likely mechanism: Jeremy forwards or drops personal email content into a dedicated Notion page/inbox, and the agent scans that page as a new source during boot-sync or a routine. Update CLAUDE.md (Email section + Drafts/Cowork section) and add handling in the relevant prompts.
title: Update PA agent to capture personal email via Notion pages
